scripts.build: cd backend && bun run build && cd ../app && bun run build
scripts.lint: cd backend && bun run lint && cd ../app && bun run lint
scripts.lint:fix: cd backend && bun run lint:fix && cd ../app && bun run lint:fix
scripts.format: cd backend && bun run format && cd ../app && bun run format
scripts.format:check: cd backend && bun run format:check && cd ../app && bun run format:check
scripts.typecheck: cd backend && bun run typecheck && cd ../app && bun run typecheck
scripts.test: cd backend && bun run test && cd ../app && bun run test
scripts.test:unit: cd backend && bun run test:unit && cd ../app && bun run test:unit
